---
title: "Colophon"
comments: false
---

## About this Site
This site is intended to serve as my personal home on the web.

## Technology

I use [Quarto](https://quarto.org/) to design the site. Quarto is an open-source scientific and technical publishing system and it is free, which is perfect for my needs. 
Inspiration and code snippets taken from these folks: [Andreas Handel](https://www.andreashandel.com/posts/2022-10-01-hugo-to-quarto-migration/), [Samantha Csik](https://samanthacsik.github.io/talks_workshops/2022-08-05-creating-your-personal-website-using-quarto/), [Lucy D'Agostino McGowan](https://livefreeordichotomize.com/posts/2022-09-19-migrating-from-hugo-to-quarto/)

The code for this website is on [GitHub](https://github.com/monicareggiani/monicareggiani.github.io) and deployed to [GitHub Pages](https://monicareggiani.github.io/). If there is an problem with this website or improvement you’d like to suggest, please open an issue on GitHub or reach out directly.

<br>
<br>
<br>

---
[Colophon](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Colophon_(publishing)) is a publishing term typically used to describe the publishing process but has been expanded to websites. This page was inspired by [Binyamin Aron Green](https://binyam.in/colophon/) and [Eric Bailey](https://ericwbailey.design/colophon/).
